prompt_improvements.content:
MANDATORY CONSTRAINTS:
• Position primary object at scene center (0, 0, 0). Use consistent reference frame.
• Request minimum 4 reference images per concept. Reject single-angle or unclear references.
• No solid flat colors. Use at least 2-3 material zones with different roughness.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Previous runs had constraint violations; make them explicit

prompt_improvements.content:
REQUEST REFERENCE IMAGES:
- Front, side, top, and detail views
- Minimum 4 angles, each 800px+
- Well-lit, clear focus
- Show material and finish
prompt_improvements.rationale: Reference quality issues detected in recurring failures

prompt_improvements.content:
GEOMETRY GUARDRAILS:
• All meshes must be watertight (manifold)
• No floating vertices or disconnected edges
• Object bounding box within 10mm-500mm range (real-world scale)
Verify each step produces clean, watertight geometry.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Mechanical validation failures reduced by enforcing geometry rules

prompt_improvements.content:
MATERIAL SPECIFICATIONS:
primary_surface: Metallic 0, Roughness 0.3
accent_material: Metallic 0.7, Roughness 0.2
Apply at least 2 materials for visual variety.

LIGHTING SETUP:
- Key light: 45° angle, 2.0 energy
- Fill light: 180° angle, 1.0 energy
- Rim light: 270° angle, 1.5 energy
- World background: 0.5 strength
- Samples: 128+
prompt_improvements.rationale: Standardized lighting reduces render quality variance

blocked_patterns.recommendation: Remove from concept prompt; use fallback step if critical
Remove from concept prompt; use fallback step if critical
Remove from concept prompt; use fallback step if critical

enhanced_constraints.issue: inconsistent sphere positioning across renders - sphere placement varies between images
enhanced_constraints.constraint: Position primary object at scene center (0, 0, 0). Use consistent reference frame.
enhanced_constraints.prompt_enhancement: Position the sphere at the exact center of the platform (use 0,0,0 in Blender). Ensure sphere is tangent to platform surface, not clipping or floating.

enhanced_constraints.issue: no reference images provided for comparison validation
enhanced_constraints.constraint: Request minimum 4 reference images per concept. Reject single-angle or unclear references.
enhanced_constraints.prompt_enhancement: Use reference images showing: front, side, top, and detail views. Each reference must be at least 800px and well-lit.

enhanced_constraints.issue: [fix] add subtle surface texture or material variation to base platform
enhanced_constraints.constraint: No solid flat colors. Use at least 2-3 material zones with different roughness.
enhanced_constraints.prompt_enhancement: Apply at least 2 different materials: one with roughness 0.2-0.4 (metal/gloss), one with 0.6-0.8 (matte). Mix on same object.

material_specs.name: primary_surface
material_specs.note: Matte finish with slight specularity for readability

material_specs.name: accent_material
material_specs.note: Metallic for visual interest and contrast

material_specs.name: quality_boost
material_specs.reason: Visual quality is low, increase detail and variation
adjustments: Add normal maps to all surfaces
Add slight subsurface scattering to organic shapes

material_specs.name: color_palette
material_specs.guidance: Use high-contrast color scheme for marketplace appeal
recommendations: Primary color: dark or saturated (avoid grey)

lighting_improvements.improvement: Enable 3-point lighting setup before all renders
Render from standard viewpoints (hero, front, side, top, detail)

geometry_guardrails.enforcement: After geometry creation, run Mesh → Clean Up → Remove Doubles, then check for non-manifold edges

geometry_guardrails.requirement: No floating vertices or disconnected edges
geometry_guardrails.enforcement: Select All, Mesh → Clean Up → Delete Loose. Verify edge count decreases.

geometry_guardrails.requirement: Object bounding box within 10mm-500mm range (real-world scale)
geometry_guardrails.enforcement: Use Blender's dimension tool. If too small, scale up; if huge, scale down.
